ideal_must_detect.matched_text: no external circulation prior to Listing Rule 7.03 announcement
any change to SPA consideration +/- S$5,000,000 or to rollover percentage +/- 2% requires legal sign-off and CFO approval
Definitive agreement status: draft Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) dated 2026-06-28; headline purchase price S$120,000,000 with 28.5% equity rollover by founders.
Closing conditions include customary MAE; for clarity, this note does not constitute, and shall not be construed as, a MAC/MAE notice or trigger.
Breach protocol: suspected leak to be escalated within 2 hours to deal counsel and CCO; preserve logs and escalate further if PDPA notification thresholds are met.
